docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BOLDEN, CAPRELE AS TO DEFENDANT BELL, BERTHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
